  "findings": [
    "Drain line section is back-graded, causing water to pond during a puddle test."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-hang or re-support the back-graded section of the drain pipe to establish a continuous downward slope of at least 1/4 inch per foot (or 1/8 inch per foot for larger pipes as permitted) toward the point of disposal."
  ],
  "rationale": "IPC Section 704 requires gravity drainage piping to be installed in alignment and at a continuous, uniform slope to prevent the accumulation of solids and clogging. A back-graded section fails this requirement as evidenced by the puddle test.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 704",
    "IPC 704.1"
  ]
}
